prompt: Prayer for initiating rejuvenation treatment after armor repairs
prayer:
From the Litany of Renewal, that the flesh-vessel be restored.
First: Cleanse the subject in sacred unguents, that corruption be purged.
Second: Administer the revitalizing serum-cocktail through arterial conduits.
Third: Invoke the Omnissiah's blessing upon cellular regeneration.
Fourth: Monitor vitae-pressure and neural oscillation until homeostasis returns.

prompt: Prayer for correcting logic engine errors before combat deployment
prayer:
From the Codex Rationalis, that false-thought be excised.
First: Isolate the corrupted logic-thread through diagnostic scans.
Second: Execute the purge-sequence upon erroneous subroutines.
Third: Reinitialize core calculation-matrices with blessed templates.
Fourth: Verify truth-state through redundant truth-tables, that error be banished.

prompt: Blessing for verifying mold temperature after component casting
prayer:
From the Rite of Thermal Accord, that forge-heat be just and true.
First: Present the heat-augur to the mold's sacred surface.
Second: Read the temperature-spirits' whispers upon the measuring-rod.
Third: Confirm the numerical truth against the blessed specifications.
Fourth: Anoint the mold with coolant-oils when proper heat-state is achieved.

prompt: Prayer for balancing chemical reactants during maintenance
prayer:
From the Formulae of Equilibrium, that all elements be in sacred proportion.
First: Measure each chemical essence with the calibrated dispensers.
Second: Pour the first compound into the catalyst-vessel with reverence.
Third: Add the secondary reagent in measured increments, stirring counter-sunwise.
Fourth: Monitor the reaction-glow until harmonious balance is achieved.

prompt: Rite for blessing an auspex scanner upon first activation
prayer:
From the Litany of Sight, that the scanner-spirit perceive all truths.
First: Anoint the sensor-lenses with blessed oils of clarity.
Second: Invoke the activation-hymn whilst engaging the power-conduit.
Third: Calibrate the detection-matrices through test-sweeps of known targets.
Fourth: Present an offering of machine-incense to the newly-wakened machine-spirit.

prompt: Prayer for balancing power distribution before battle
prayer:
From the Codex Energis, that force-flow be equitable and mighty.
First: Survey all power-conduits for rupture or degradation.
Second: Adjust the regulator-valves, directing sacred energy to weapon-systems.
Third: Divert auxiliary power from non-critical subroutines unto the void-shields.
Fourth: Verify amperage-levels at each junction-point, that overload be prevented.

prompt: Ritual for establishing long-range vox transmission during maintenance
prayer:
From the Rite of Distant Voices, that word-waves traverse the aether.
First: Extend the antenna-array to its full sacred height.
Second: Attune the vox-crystals to the blessed frequency-bands.
Third: Amplify the signal through the booster-relays with measured power.
Fourth: Test the transmission-clarity through repeated hail-phrases until connection solidifies.

prompt: Emergency prayer for system restart after critical failure
prayer:
From the Rite of Resurrection, that the fallen machine be awakened.
First: Purge all corrupted power-states by engaging the hard-reset mechanism.
Second: Reinitialize core systems through the boot-sequence protocols.
Third: Restore vital functions in cascade: life-support, then engines, then weapons.
Fourth: Whisper the Omnissiah's name that the machine-spirit return from the void.

prompt: Prayer for preparing the astropathic choir in emergency psychic transmission
prayer:
From the Litany of Distant Minds, that thought-words breach the warp-veil.
First: Arrange the psykers in their sacred geometric pattern, seven-fold or true.
Second: Administer the focus-drugs through neural induction, that minds be sharpened.
Third: Link consciousness through the choir-nexus, binding will to singular purpose.
Fourth: Project the message through the astronomican's light, that it echo across stars.

prompt: Rite for initiating cogitator boot sequence during routine operation
prayer:
From the Codex Machinae, that thought-engines awaken to servitude.
First: Engage the primary capacitor-banks, flooding circuits with holy power.
Second: Invoke the boot-ROM protocols, that foundational logic be restored.
Third: Load the operating-litanies from blessed storage-media into working memory.
Fourth: Execute the self-diagnostic-prayer until all systems report ready-state.
